properties.name: spring.jackson.cbor.read
properties.description: Jackson on/off token reader features that are specific to CBOR.

properties.name: spring.jackson.cbor.write
properties.description: Jackson on/off token writer features that are specific to CBOR.

properties.name: spring.jackson.constructor-detector
properties.description: Strategy to use to auto-detect constructor, and in particular behavior with single-argument constructors.

properties.name: spring.jackson.datatype.datetime
properties.description: Jackson on/off features for DateTimes.

properties.name: spring.jackson.datatype.enum
properties.description: Jackson on/off features for enums.

properties.name: spring.jackson.datatype.json-node
properties.description: Jackson on/off features for JsonNodes.

properties.name: spring.jackson.date-format
properties.description: Date format string or a fully-qualified date format class name. For instance, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'.

properties.name: spring.jackson.default-leniency
properties.description: Global default setting (if any) for leniency.

properties.name: spring.jackson.default-property-inclusion
properties.description: Controls the inclusion of properties during serialization. Configured with one of the values in Jackson's JsonInclude.Include enumeration.

properties.name: spring.jackson.deserialization
properties.description: Jackson on/off features that affect the way Java objects are deserialized.

properties.name: spring.jackson.find-and-add-modules
properties.description: Whether to find and add modules to the auto-configured JsonMapper.Builder using MapperBuilder.findAndAddModules(ClassLoader).

properties.name: spring.jackson.json.read
properties.description: Jackson on/off token reader features that are specific to JSON.

properties.name: spring.jackson.json.write
properties.description: Jackson on/off token writer features that are specific to JSON.

properties.name: spring.jackson.locale
properties.description: Locale used for formatting.

properties.name: spring.jackson.mapper
properties.description: Jackson general purpose on/off features.

properties.name: spring.jackson.property-naming-strategy
properties.description: One of the constants on Jackson's PropertyNamingStrategies. Can also be a fully-qualified class name of a PropertyNamingStrategy implementation.

properties.name: spring.jackson.serialization
properties.description: Jackson on/off features that affect the way Java objects are serialized.

properties.name: spring.jackson.time-zone
properties.description: Time zone used when formatting dates. For instance, "America/Los_Angeles" or "GMT+10".

properties.name: spring.jackson.use-jackson2-defaults
properties.description: Whether to configure Jackson 3 with the same defaults as Spring Boot previously used for Jackson 2.

properties.name: spring.jackson.visibility
properties.description: Jackson visibility thresholds that can be used to limit which methods (and fields) are auto-detected.

properties.name: spring.jackson.xml.read
properties.description: Jackson on/off token reader features that are specific to XML.

properties.name: spring.jackson.xml.write
properties.description: Jackson on/off token writer features that are specific to XML.

properties.name: spring.jackson.joda-date-time-format
properties.description: Joda date time format string. If not configured, "date-format" is used as a fallback if it is configured with a format string.

properties.name: spring.jackson.read
properties.description: Jackson on/off token reader features that are specific to JSON.

properties.name: spring.jackson.write
properties.description: Jackson on/off token writer features that are specific to JSON.
